name: Cloak of Illusions
description:
This cloak flows, covering and concealing the wearer's body. The cloak allows you to cast as an occult innate cantrip. Although naturally a dull gray, while invested the cloak picks up colors and patterns from its surroundings, granting a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate—Draw Hood 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You draw the hood up and gain the effects of , with the spell's normal duration or until you pull the hood back down, whichever comes first.
